libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No required environment variable or system property. Preserve the existing test JVM/native-image --add-opens arguments if socket/platform internals are exercised: java.base/java.lang, java.base/java.net, and java.base/sun.nio.ch.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8879 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.conscrypt:conscrypt-openjdk-uber:1.4.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Conscrypt extracts and loads a bundled native library at runtime; unusual noexec temp directories can require -Dorg.conscrypt.native.workdir=<executable-writable-dir>, but this is not normally needed on the target Ubuntu CI setup.
The 1.4.1 native library is old, so remaining failures are more likely native-image/JDK compatibility or reachability metadata gaps than missing external setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Conscrypt OpenJDK Uber is self-contained: its POM has no extra Maven dependencies and the Uber JAR embeds the platform native libraries under META-INF/native. Normal usage is adding the provider via Conscrypt.newProvider()/Security.addProvider and exercising local TLS/crypto APIs; no external service or Docker image is required.
